text:
Once upon a time, there lived an exceptionally curious cat named Whiskers. Whiskers lived in a small meadow where every morning he would stretch his whiskers in every direction, hoping to catch a glimpse of something new.

One morning, while sniffing around a pile of dew-kissed blades of grass, Whiskers stumbled upon a peculiar-looking mirror leaning against a tree trunk. It wasn’t like any mirror he’d ever seen—it hummed with an otherworldly glow. He hesitated but felt compelled to investigate.

Standing right in front of the mirror, Whiskers looked into it. To his surprise, the reflection wasn’t him; it was a mouse wearing a tiny hat. The mouse couldn’t see Whiskers, but Whiskers saw something sparkling back at him—a way to travel.

In a flurry of excitement, Whiskers approached the mirror as if it were a window to another place. He peered closer and saw a map. Every dot
